components.name: OpenlineageEmitterComponent
components.description: Asset check that emits OpenLineage START/COMPLETE events to OL-compatible backends (Marquez, DataHub, OpenMetadata) when an upstream asset materializes.
components.author: Dagster Community

components.name: IcebergMaintenanceJobComponent
components.description: Cron-driven Iceberg maintenance — OPTIMIZE (compaction), expire snapshots, remove orphans, rewrite manifests. Engine support: Spark, Trino, Athena.
components.author: Dagster Community

components.name: MssqlResourceComponent
components.description: SQL Server / Azure SQL Database Dagster resource — connection string + connection factory shared across assets. Mirrors postgres_resource and mysql_resource.
components.author: Dagster Community
